SOLUTIONS
HomeSolutions

PUE-AS-
A-SERVICE.

We finance and manage portfolios across:

02Engagement Models
AGASSET — 2025

Flexibility in Partnership.

Model A

Asset Ownership Model

Financed 100% by AgAsset Co. Ownership transfers to the partner after the lease term concludes. Ideal for established SMEs.

Model B

PUE-as-a-Service

We retain long-term ownership. Users pay per-service (kg/liter/hour). Full O&M is included in the service fee.

03Portfolio
AGASSET — 2025

High-Impact Categories.

Agro-Processing

Industrial-grade milling and hulling that reduces post-harvest loss.

Cold Chain

Localized temperature-controlled logistics for fishery and dairy.

Water Systems

Solar-powered irrigation providing year-round farming independence.

E-Mobility

Replacing fossil-fuel delivery logistics with efficient electric transport.

04Management
AGASSET — 2025

Live Telemetry Feed


Smart Selection

Commercial viability testing via Agronomie's deep-market data before deployment.

IoT Telemetry

Real-time tracking and remote lockout capabilities for credit risk mitigation.

Last-Mile Support

Local technical partners and on-site servicing for guaranteed asset uptime.

05 B2B Synergy


Daytime consumption optimization
Anchor load stability
Revenue share opportunities
Integrated smart metering
